reconciliation.horizontal: The fixed-grid protocol found an inverse visible eye cue. After inverting the horizontal eye and complete-head coefficients and rerendering, three fresh 3x semantic blind reviewers unanimously passed the final pair without facial separation.
reconciliation.vertical: All three final semantic blind reviewers passed; vertical coefficients were unchanged and the rendered control sign remains correct.
reconciliation.coefficient_action: inverted horizontal eye and complete-head coefficients before final rerender
